domains.name: Domain 4: Basics of IT and Architecture

questions.text: Per official CompTIA exam objectives and study resources, which source should you use when studying Project Management Concepts for CompTIA Project+?
questions.explanation: Use Project+ Exam Objectives and other official materials listed in the exam guide—not copied exam items.

questions.text: Which approach BEST supports the objective to balance scope time cost quality?

A technician must identify stakeholders early. What is the best choice?
Per CompTIA best practices, you should balance scope time cost quality.
During troubleshooting, you must identify stakeholders early.
On the job, you need to balance scope time cost quality.
For compliance, the team must identify stakeholders early.

questions.explanation: Constraints guide decisions. Compare with Stakeholder register and analysis: Stakeholders influence requirements.
